original_question: A 23-year-old pregnant woman at 22 weeks gestation presents with burning upon urination. She states it started 1 day ago and has been worsening despite drinking more water and taking cranberry extract. She otherwise feels well and is followed by a doctor for her pregnancy. Her temperature is 97.7°F (36.5°C), blood pressure is 122/77 mmHg, pulse is 80/min, respirations are 19/min, and oxygen saturation is 98% on room air. Physical exam is notable for an absence of costovertebral angle tenderness and a gravid uterus. Which of the following is the best treatment for this patient?
translated_question: 一名23岁孕妇，妊娠22周，主诉排尿时有烧灼感。患者表示症状始于1天前，尽管增加了饮水量并服用了蔓越莓提取物，症状仍持续加重。除此之外，患者自觉状况良好，孕期一直有医生随访。体温97.7°F（36.5°C），血压122/77 mmHg，脉搏80次/分，呼吸19次/分，室内空气下血氧饱和度98%。体格检查显示无肋脊角压痛，子宫呈妊娠状态。以下哪项是该患者的最佳治疗方案？

original_question: A 3-month-old baby died suddenly at night while asleep. His mother noticed that he had died only after she awoke in the morning. No cause of death was determined based on the autopsy. Which of the following precautions could have prevented the death of the baby?
translated_question: 一名3个月大的婴儿在夜间睡眠中突然死亡。其母亲直到早晨醒来才发现婴儿已死亡。尸检未能确定死因。以下哪项预防措施本可避免婴儿死亡？

original_options.A: Placing the infant in a supine position on a firm mattress while sleeping
original_options.B: Keeping the infant covered and maintaining a high room temperature
original_options.C: Application of a device to maintain the sleeping position

translated_options.A: 将婴儿置于仰卧位，在坚硬的床垫上睡眠
translated_options.B: 保持婴儿身体覆盖并维持较高的室温
translated_options.C: 睡眠姿势维持装置的应用
translated_options.D: 睡眠期间避免使用安抚奶嘴

original_answer: Placing the infant in a supine position on a firm mattress while sleeping
translated_answer: 将婴儿置于仰卧位，在坚硬的床垫上睡眠

original_question: A mother brings her 3-week-old infant to the pediatrician's office because she is concerned about his feeding habits. He was born without complications and has not had any medical problems up until this time. However, for the past 4 days, he has been fussy, is regurgitating all of his feeds, and his vomit is yellow in color. On physical exam, the child's abdomen is minimally distended but no other abnormalities are appreciated. Which of the following embryologic errors could account for this presentation?
translated_question: 一位母亲带着她3周大的婴儿来到儿科诊所，因为她担心孩子的喂养习惯。婴儿出生时无并发症，此前未出现任何健康问题。然而，过去4天里，婴儿一直烦躁不安，每次喂食后都会反流，且呕吐物呈黄色。体格检查显示，患儿腹部轻微膨隆，但未发现其他异常。以下哪种胚胎发育异常可能导致这一临床表现？

original_options.A: Abnormal migration of ventral pancreatic bud
original_options.B: Complete failure of proximal duodenum to recanalize
original_options.D: Failure of lateral body folds to move ventrally and fuse in the midline

translated_options.B: 近端十二指肠完全再通失败
translated_options.D: 外侧体褶未能向腹侧移动并在中线融合

original_answer: Abnormal migration of ventral pancreatic bud

original_question: A pulmonary autopsy specimen from a 58-year-old woman who died of acute hypoxic respiratory failure was examined. She had recently undergone surgery for a fractured femur 3 months ago. Initial hospital course was uncomplicated, and she was discharged to a rehab facility in good health. Shortly after discharge home from rehab, she developed sudden shortness of breath and had cardiac arrest. Resuscitation was unsuccessful. On histological examination of lung tissue, fibrous connective tissue around the lumen of the pulmonary artery is observed. Which of the following is the most likely pathogenesis for the present findings?
translated_question: 对一名死于急性低氧性呼吸衰竭的58岁女性进行肺部尸检标本检查。该患者3个月前曾因股骨骨折接受手术。初期住院过程顺利，出院时健康状况良好，转入康复机构。从康复机构出院回家后不久，她突然出现呼吸急促并发生心脏骤停。复苏未成功。肺组织病理学检查显示，肺动脉管腔周围可见纤维结缔组织。下列哪项是当前发现最可能的发病机制？

original_question: A 20-year-old woman presents with menorrhagia for the past several years. She says that her menses “have always been heavy”, and she has experienced easy bruising for as long as she can remember. Family history is significant for her mother, who had similar problems with bruising easily. The patient's vital signs include: heart rate 98/min, respiratory rate 14/min, temperature 36.1°C (96.9°F), and blood pressure 110/87 mm Hg. Physical examination is unremarkable. Laboratory tests show the following: platelet count 200,000/mm3, PT 12 seconds, and PTT 43 seconds. Which of the following is the most likely cause of this patient’s symptoms?
translated_question: 一名20岁女性患者，主诉过去数年月经量过多。她表示自己的月经“一直量很大”，并且自记事起就容易出现瘀伤。家族史中值得注意的是，她的母亲也有类似的易瘀伤问题。患者生命体征包括：心率98次/分，呼吸频率14次/分，体温36.1°C（96.9°F），血压110/87 mmHg。体格检查未见明显异常。实验室检查显示：血小板计数200,000/mm³，凝血酶原时间（PT）12秒，部分凝血活酶时间（PTT）43秒。以下哪项是导致该患者症状最可能的原因？

original_question: A 40-year-old zookeeper presents to the emergency department complaining of severe abdominal pain that radiates to her back, and nausea. The pain started 2 days ago and slowly increased until she could not tolerate it any longer. Past medical history is significant for hypertension and hypothyroidism. Additionally, she reports that she was recently stung by one of the zoo’s smaller scorpions, but did not seek medical treatment. She takes aspirin, levothyroxine, oral contraceptive pills, and a multivitamin daily. Family history is noncontributory. Today, her blood pressure is 108/58 mm Hg, heart rate is 99/min, respiratory rate is 21/min, and temperature is 37.0°C (98.6°F). On physical exam, she is a well-developed, obese female that looks unwell. Her heart has a regular rate and rhythm. Radial pulses are weak but symmetric. Her lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally. Her lateral left ankle is swollen, erythematous, and painful to palpate. An abdominal CT is consistent with acute pancreatitis. Which of the following is the most likely etiology for this patient’s disease?
translated_question: 一名40岁的动物园管理员因剧烈腹痛并放射至背部，伴恶心前来急诊就诊。疼痛始于两天前，逐渐加剧直至无法忍受。既往病史有高血压和甲状腺功能减退。此外，她自述近期曾被动物园内一只小型蝎子蜇伤，但未就医。她每日服用阿司匹林、左甲状腺素、口服避孕药及复合维生素。家族史无特殊。今日血压108/58 mmHg，心率99次/分，呼吸频率21次/分，体温37.0°C（98.6°F）。体格检查显示，她为发育良好、体型肥胖的女性，呈病容。心律规整，桡动脉搏动微弱但对称。双肺听诊呼吸音清晰。左外踝肿胀、发红，触痛明显。腹部CT检查符合急性胰腺炎表现。以下哪项是该患者疾病最可能的病因？

original_question: A 25-year-old primigravida presents to her physician for a routine prenatal visit. She is at 34 weeks gestation, as confirmed by an ultrasound examination. She has no complaints, but notes that the new shoes she bought 2 weeks ago do not fit anymore. The course of her pregnancy has been uneventful and she has been compliant with the recommended prenatal care. Her medical history is unremarkable. She has a 15-pound weight gain since the last visit 3 weeks ago. Her vital signs are as follows: blood pressure, 148/90 mm Hg; heart rate, 88/min; respiratory rate, 16/min; and temperature, 36.6℃ (97.9℉). The blood pressure on repeat assessment 4 hours later is 151/90 mm Hg. The fetal heart rate is 151/min. The physical examination is significant for 2+ pitting edema of the lower extremity. Which of the following tests o should confirm the probable condition of this patient?
translated_question: 一名25岁初产妇因常规产前检查就诊于医生处。她目前妊娠34周，经超声检查确认。患者无任何不适主诉，但提到两周前购买的新鞋现已不合脚。孕期过程平稳，她一直遵循建议的产前保健方案。既往病史无特殊。自三周前上次就诊以来，体重增加了15磅。生命体征如下：血压148/90毫米汞柱；心率88次/分；呼吸频率16次/分；体温36.6℃（97.9℉）。4小时后复测血压为151/90毫米汞柱。胎心率为151次/分。体格检查显示下肢存在2+凹陷性水肿。以下哪项检查能确诊该患者可能的病情？

original_question: A 3900-g (8.6-lb) male infant is delivered at 39 weeks' gestation via spontaneous vaginal delivery. Pregnancy and delivery were uncomplicated but a prenatal ultrasound at 20 weeks showed a defect in the pleuroperitoneal membrane. Further evaluation of this patient is most likely to show which of the following findings?
translated_question: 一名3900克（8.6磅）的男婴在妊娠39周时经自然阴道分娩出生。妊娠和分娩过程均无并发症，但孕20周的产前超声检查显示胸腹膜存在缺损。对该患儿进行进一步评估最可能显示以下哪项发现？

original_options.D: Large bowel in the inguinal canal

original_question: A 62-year-old woman presents for a regular check-up. She complains of lightheadedness and palpitations which occur episodically. Past medical history is significant for a myocardial infarction 6 months ago and NYHA class II chronic heart failure. She also was diagnosed with grade I arterial hypertension 4 years ago. Current medications are aspirin 81 mg, atorvastatin 10 mg, enalapril 10 mg, and metoprolol 200 mg daily. Her vital signs are a blood pressure of 135/90 mm Hg, a heart rate of 125/min, a respiratory rate of 14/min, and a temperature of 36.5°C (97.7°F). Cardiopulmonary examination is significant for irregular heart rhythm and decreased S1 intensity. ECG is obtained and is shown in the picture (see image). Echocardiography shows a left ventricular ejection fraction of 39%. Which of the following drugs is the best choice for rate control in this patient?
translated_question: 一位62岁女性前来进行常规体检。她主诉偶发性头晕和心悸。既往病史包括6个月前的心肌梗死和纽约心脏协会（NYHA）分级II级的慢性心力衰竭。此外，她在4年前被诊断为I级动脉高血压。目前每日服用的药物包括阿司匹林81毫克、阿托伐他汀10毫克、依那普利10毫克和美托洛尔200毫克。她的生命体征为血压135/90毫米汞柱，心率125次/分钟，呼吸频率14次/分钟，体温36.5°C（97.7°F）。心肺检查显示心律不齐且第一心音强度减弱。心电图检查结果如图所示（见图片）。超声心动图显示左心室射血分数为39%。对于该患者，以下哪种药物是控制心率的最佳选择？

original_question: A 35-year-old male presents to his primary care physician with complaints of seasonal allergies. He has been using intranasal vasoconstrictors several times per day for several weeks. What is a likely sequela of the chronic use of topical nasal decongestants?
translated_question: 一名35岁男性因季节性过敏症状就诊于其初级保健医生。他每天多次使用鼻内血管收缩剂已持续数周。长期使用局部鼻减充血剂可能导致什么后果？

original_question: A 46-year-old woman comes to the physician because of a 2-week history of diplopia and ocular pain when reading the newspaper. She also has a 3-month history of amenorrhea, hot flashes, and increased sweating. She reports that she has been overweight all her adult life and is happy to have lost 6.8-kg (15-lb) of weight in the past 2 months. Her pulse is 110/min, and blood pressure is 148/98 mm Hg. Physical examination shows moist palms and a nontender thyroid gland that is enlarged to two times its normal size. Ophthalmologic examination shows prominence of the globes of the eyes, bilateral lid retraction, conjunctival injection, and an inability to converge the eyes. There is no pain on movement of the extraocular muscles. Visual acuity is 20/20 bilaterally. Neurologic examination shows a fine resting tremor of the hands. Deep tendon reflexes are 3+ with a shortened relaxation phase. Which of the following is the most likely cause of this patient's ocular complaints?
translated_question: 一名46岁女性因持续2周阅读报纸时出现复视和眼痛前来就诊。她还有3个月的闭经、潮热和多汗病史。她自述成年后一直超重，并对过去2个月内体重减轻6.8公斤（15磅）感到高兴。她的脉搏为110次/分，血压为148/98毫米汞柱。体格检查显示手掌潮湿，甲状腺无压痛但肿大至正常大小的两倍。眼科检查显示眼球突出、双侧眼睑退缩、结膜充血以及双眼会聚功能丧失。眼外肌运动时无疼痛。双侧视力均为20/20。神经系统检查显示双手存在细微的静止性震颤。深部腱反射为3+，且松弛期缩短。下列哪项是该患者眼部症状最可能的原因？

original_options.A: Granulomatous inflammation of the cavernous sinus
original_options.B: Abnormal communication between the cavernous sinus and the internal carotid artery
original_options.D:
Sympathetic hyperactivity of levator palpebrae superioris
"

translated_options.B: 海绵窦与颈内动脉之间的异常交通
translated_options.D: 上睑提肌交感神经过度活跃

original_question: A 1-year-old boy presents to the emergency department with weakness and a change in his behavior. His parents state that they first noticed the change in his behavior this morning and it has been getting worse. They noticed the patient was initially weak in his upper body and arms, but now he won’t move his legs with as much strength or vigor as he used to. Physical exam is notable for bilateral ptosis with a sluggish pupillary response, a very weak sucking and gag reflex, and shallow respirations. The patient is currently drooling and his diaper is dry. The parents state he has not had a bowel movement in over 1 day. Which of the following is the pathophysiology of this patient’s condition?
translated_question: 一名1岁男童因乏力和行为改变被送往急诊科。其父母表示今晨首次注意到患儿行为变化，且症状持续加重。患儿最初表现为上半身及手臂无力，现双下肢活动力量及活力明显减弱。体格检查可见双侧眼睑下垂伴瞳孔反应迟钝，吸吮及咽反射显著减弱，呼吸浅促。患儿目前流涎明显，尿布干燥。家长称其已超过1日未排便。以下哪项是导致该患儿病情的病理生理机制？

original_options.A: Autoantibodies against the presynaptic voltage-gated calcium channels
original_options.C: Blockade of presynaptic acetylcholine release at the neuromuscular junction
original_options.D: Lower motor neuron destruction in the anterior horn

translated_options.A: 针对突触前电压门控钙通道的自身抗体
translated_options.B: 周围神经自身免疫性脱髓鞘
translated_options.C: 神经肌肉接头处突触前乙酰胆碱释放的阻断
translated_options.D: 前角下运动神经元破坏

original_answer: Blockade of presynaptic acetylcholine release at the neuromuscular junction
translated_answer: 神经肌肉接头处突触前乙酰胆碱释放的阻断

original_question: A 9-month-old female is brought to the emergency department after experiencing a seizure. She was born at home and was normal at birth according to her parents. Since then, they have noticed that she does not appear to be achieving developmental milestones as quickly as her siblings, and often appears lethargic. Physical exam reveals microcephaly, very light pigmentation (as compared to her family), and a "musty" body odor. The varied manifestations of this disease can most likely be attributed to which of the following genetic principles?
translated_question: 一名9个月大的女婴因发生惊厥被送往急诊室。据其父母描述，她在家中出生，出生时情况正常。此后，他们注意到她达到发育里程碑的速度似乎不如她的兄弟姐妹快，且常显得嗜睡。体格检查显示她有小头畸形、肤色较家人明显浅淡，并带有"霉味"体臭。这种疾病的各种表现最可能归因于以下哪种遗传学原理？

original_question: A 23-year-old man comes to the physician for evaluation of decreased hearing, dizziness, and ringing in his right ear for the past 6 months. Physical examination shows multiple soft, yellow plaques and papules on his arms, chest, and back. There is sensorineural hearing loss and weakness of facial muscles bilaterally. His gait is unsteady. An MRI of the brain shows a 3-cm mass near the right internal auditory meatus and a 2-cm mass at the left cerebellopontine angle. The abnormal cells in these masses are most likely derived from which of the following embryological structures?
translated_question: 一名23岁男性因右耳听力下降、头晕及耳鸣6个月前来就诊。体格检查发现其手臂、胸部和背部有多处柔软黄色斑块和丘疹。患者存在双侧感音神经性听力损失及面部肌肉无力，步态不稳。脑部MRI显示右侧内听道附近有一个3厘米的肿块，左侧小脑脑桥角有一个2厘米的肿块。这些肿块中的异常细胞最可能来源于以下哪个胚胎结构？

original_question: A 62-year-old woman comes to the physician because of coughing and fatigue during the past 2 years. In the morning, the cough is productive of white phlegm. She becomes short of breath walking up a flight of stairs. She has hypertension and hyperlipidemia. She has recently retired from working as a nurse at a homeless shelter. She has smoked 1 pack of cigarettes daily for 40 years. Current medications include ramipril and fenofibrate. Her temperature is 36.5°C (97.7°F), respirations are 24/min, pulse is 85/min, and blood pressure is 140/90 mm Hg. Scattered wheezing and rhonchi are heard throughout both lung fields. There are no murmurs, rubs, or gallops but heart sounds are distant. Which of the following is the most likely underlying cause of this patient's symptoms?
translated_question: 一位62岁女性因近2年咳嗽、乏力就诊。晨起咳嗽时咳出白色痰液。上楼梯时出现气短。患者有高血压和高脂血症病史。近期刚从无家可归者收容所的护士岗位退休。吸烟史40年，每日1包。当前用药包括雷米普利和非诺贝特。体温36.5°C（97.7°F），呼吸24次/分，脉搏85次/分，血压140/90 mmHg。双肺野可闻及散在哮鸣音和干啰音。未闻及心脏杂音、摩擦音或奔马律，但心音遥远。下列哪项是导致该患者症状最可能的根本原因？

original_options.D:
Incremental loss of functional residual capacity
"

translated_options.D: 功能性残气量进行性减少

original_question: A 68-year-old man presents to the emergency department with leg pain. He states that the pain started suddenly while he was walking outside. The patient has a past medical history of diabetes, hypertension, obesity, and atrial fibrillation. His temperature is 99.3°F (37.4°C), blood pressure is 152/98 mmHg, pulse is 97/min, respirations are 15/min, and oxygen saturation is 99% on room air. Physical exam is notable for a cold and pale left leg. The patient’s sensation is markedly diminished in the left leg when compared to the right, and his muscle strength is 1/5 in his left leg. Which of the following is the best next step in management?
translated_question: 一名68岁男性因腿部疼痛就诊于急诊科。患者自述疼痛于户外行走时突然发作。既往有糖尿病、高血压、肥胖及心房颤动病史。体温99.3°F（37.4°C），血压152/98 mmHg，脉搏97次/分，呼吸15次/分，室内空气下血氧饱和度99%。体格检查发现左腿冰冷苍白。与右腿相比，患者左腿感觉明显减退，肌力为1/5。以下哪项是下一步最合适的处理措施？

original_question: A 76-year-old African American man presents to his primary care provider complaining of urinary frequency. He wakes up 3-4 times per night to urinate while he previously only had to wake up once per night. He also complains of post-void dribbling and difficulty initiating a stream of urine. He denies any difficulty maintaining an erection. His past medical history is notable for non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, hypertension, hyperlipidemia, and gout. He takes aspirin, atorvastatin, enalapril, and allopurinol. His family history is notable for prostate cancer in his father and lung cancer in his mother. He has a 15-pack-year smoking history and drinks alcohol socially. On digital rectal exam, his prostate is enlarged, smooth, and non-tender. Which of the following medications is indicated in this patient?
translated_question: 一名76岁非裔美国男性因尿频就诊于其初级保健医生。他每晚需起床排尿3-4次，而以往仅需起床一次。他还主诉排尿后滴沥及排尿启动困难。患者否认存在勃起维持困难。既往病史包括非酒精性脂肪肝、高血压、高脂血症和痛风。目前服用阿司匹林、阿托伐他汀、依那普利和别嘌呤醇。家族史中父亲有前列腺癌病史，母亲有肺癌病史。患者有15包-年的吸烟史，社交性饮酒。直肠指检显示前列腺增大、表面光滑、无压痛。该患者应选用下列哪种药物？

original_question: A 68-year-old man comes to the physician because of recurrent episodes of nausea and abdominal discomfort for the past 4 months. The discomfort is located in the upper abdomen and sometimes occurs after eating, especially after a big meal. He has tried to go for a walk after dinner to help with digestion, but his complaints have only increased. For the past 3 weeks he has also had symptoms while climbing the stairs to his apartment. He has type 2 diabetes mellitus, hypertension, and stage 2 peripheral arterial disease. He has smoked one pack of cigarettes daily for the past 45 years. He drinks one to two beers daily and occasionally more on weekends. His current medications include metformin, enalapril, and aspirin. He is 168 cm (5 ft 6 in) tall and weighs 126 kg (278 lb); BMI is 45 kg/m2. His temperature is 36.4°C (97.5°F), pulse is 78/min, and blood pressure is 148/86 mm Hg. original_question: A researcher is studying the properties of an enzyme that adds phosphate groups to glucose. translated_question: 一名8个月大的男婴由其母亲带到诊所。母亲称，婴儿近期非常烦躁且进食不佳。尽管喂养不良，母亲认为婴儿体重仍在增加。该男婴为孕39周经阴道分娩，无并发症。体格检查时，婴儿在母亲怀中哭闹，未见发绀，心脏检查结果正常。触诊腹部时哭闹加剧，腹部膨隆，左下腹叩诊呈鼓音。你怀疑这是一种由特定细胞迁移失败引起的疾病。最可能的诊断是什么？

original_question: A 60-year-old man seeks evaluation at a medical office due to leg pain while walking. He says the pain starts in his buttocks and extends to his thighs and down to his calves. Previously, the pain resolved with rest, but the pain now persists in his feet, even during rest. His past medical history is significant for diabetes mellitus, hypertension, and cigarette smoking. The vital signs are within normal limits. The physical examination shows an atrophied leg with bilateral loss of hair. Which of the following is the most likely cause of this patient’s condition?
translated_question: 一名60岁男性因行走时腿部疼痛前往医疗诊所就诊。他描述疼痛始于臀部，延伸至大腿并向下蔓延至小腿。以往休息后疼痛可缓解，但如今即使休息时足部仍持续疼痛。其既往病史包括糖尿病、高血压及吸烟史。生命体征均在正常范围内。体格检查显示腿部肌肉萎缩，双侧毛发脱落。以下哪项是该患者病情最可能的原因？

original_question:
A 52-year-old man presents to the emergency department with chest pain radiating to his left jaw and arm. He states that he had experienced similar symptoms when playing basketball. The medical history is significant for diabetes mellitus, hypertension, and GERD, for which he takes metformin, hydrochlorothiazide, and pantoprazole, respectively. The blood pressure is 150/90 mm Hg, the pulse is 100/min, and the respirations are 15/min. The ECG reveals ST elevation in leads V3-V6. He is hospitalized for an acute MI and started on treatment. 一名52岁男性因胸痛放射至左下颌和手臂至急诊就诊。患者自述打篮球时曾出现类似症状。既往病史包括糖尿病、高血压和胃食管反流病，分别服用二甲双胍、氢氯噻嗪和泮托拉唑治疗。血压150/90 mmHg，心率100次/分，呼吸频率15次/分。心电图显示V3-V6导联ST段抬高。患者因急性心肌梗死入院并开始治疗。次日主诉头晕和视物模糊。复查生命体征如下：血压90/60 mmHg，心率72次/分，呼吸频率12次/分。实验室检查结果如下：
血清化学

original_question: A 28-year-old woman is brought to the hospital by her boyfriend. She has had three days of fever and headache followed by one day of worsening confusion and hallucinations. She also becomes agitated when offered water. Her temperature is 101°F (38.3°C). Two months prior to presentation, the couple was camping and encountered bats in their cabin. original_options.A: A killed vaccine within ten days of exposure

original_options.C: Venom antiserum within hours of exposure
original_options.D: Doxycycline for one month after exposure

original_question: A 60-year-old man comes to the physician for an examination prior to a scheduled cholecystectomy. He has hypertension treated with hydrochlorothiazide. translated_options.C: 测量血管紧张素转换酶

original_question: You are examining a 3-day-old newborn who was delivered vaginally without any complications. The newborn presents with vomiting, hyperventilation, lethargy, and seizures. translated_question: 你正在检查一名3天大的新生儿，该新生儿经阴道分娩，无任何并发症。新生儿出现呕吐、呼吸急促、嗜睡和癫痫发作。血液检查显示高氨血症、谷氨酰胺水平升高以及血尿素氮降低。CT扫描显示脑水肿。以下哪种酶的缺陷会导致与该婴儿相似的临床表现？

original_question: A 48-year-old man with HIV comes to the physician because of skin lesions over his face and neck for 2 weeks. They are not itchy or painful. translated_question: 一名48岁男性HIV患者因面部和颈部出现皮肤病变2周就诊。皮损无瘙痒或疼痛。患者无发热或咽喉痛。3个月前曾因念珠菌性食管炎接受治疗。他与知晓其病情的妻子保持活跃性生活，并坚持使用安全套。目前正接受拉米夫定、阿巴卡韦和依非韦伦的三联抗逆转录病毒治疗。身高175厘米（5英尺9英寸），体重58公斤（128磅），体重指数为18.8 kg/m²。查体可见面部和颈部多发肤色丘疹，中心呈脐凹状。存在颈部淋巴结肿大。其余检查未见异常。血红蛋白浓度12.1 g/dL，白细胞计数4,900/mm³，血小板计数143,000/mm³；血清学检查和尿液分析无异常。CD4⁺ T淋巴细胞计数为312/mm³（正常值≥500）。以下哪项是导致该患者临床表现的最可能原因？

original_question: A 55-year-old man comes to the physician because of fatigue and worsening abdominal pain for 4 weeks. He also reports excessive night sweats and a 5.4-kg (12-lb) weight loss during this time. He has a neck swelling for 4 days. Physical examination shows a nontender, enlarged, and fixed supraclavicular lymph node. There is splenomegaly. A CT scan of the thorax and abdomen shows massively enlarged axillary, mediastinal, and cervical lymph nodes. Analysis of an excised cervical lymph node shows lymphocytes with a high proliferative index that stain positive for CD20. Which of the following is the most likely diagnosis?
translated_question: 一名55岁男性因疲劳和腹痛加重4周前来就诊。他还报告在此期间出现夜间盗汗过多和体重减轻5.4公斤（12磅）。颈部肿胀已持续4天。体格检查显示锁骨上淋巴结无痛性肿大且固定。脾脏肿大。胸腹部CT扫描显示腋窝、纵隔和颈部淋巴结显著肿大。切除的颈部淋巴结分析显示淋巴细胞增殖指数高，CD20染色阳性。以下哪项是最可能的诊断？

original_question: A 26-year-old G1P0 woman at 32-weeks gestation presents for follow-up ultrasound. She was diagnosed with gestational diabetes during her second trimester, but admits to poor glucose control and non-adherence to insulin therapy. Fetal ultrasound reveals an asymmetric, enlarged interventricular septum, left ventricular outflow tract obstruction, and significantly reduced ejection fraction. translated_question: 一名26岁、初次妊娠、孕32周的孕妇前来进行随访超声检查。她在孕中期被诊断为妊娠期糖尿病，但自述血糖控制不佳且未坚持胰岛素治疗。胎儿超声显示心室间隔不对称增厚、左心室流出道梗阻以及射血分数显著降低。分娩后，以下哪项是最合适的处理步骤？

original_question: A recent study attempted to analyze whether increased "patient satisfaction" driven healthcare resulted in increased hospitalization. In this hospital, several of the wards adopted new aspects of "patient satisfaction" driven healthcare, whereas the remainder of the hospital continued to use existing protocols. Baseline population characteristics and demographics were collected at the start of the study. At the end of the following year, hospital use was assessed and compared between the two groups. Which of the following best describes this type of study?
translated_question: 最近一项研究试图分析以提升"患者满意度"为导向的医疗模式是否会增加住院率。该医院部分病区采用了新型的"患者满意度"驱动医疗方案，而其余病区仍沿用原有诊疗方案。研究初期收集了基线人群特征与人口统计学数据。次年年底，对两组患者的医疗资源使用情况进行评估比较。以下哪项最能描述此类研究类型？

original_question: A new screening test utilizing a telemedicine approach to diagnosing diabetic retinopathy has been implemented in a diabetes clinic. An ophthalmologist’s exam was also performed on all patients as the gold standard for diagnosis. In a pilot study of 500 patients, the screening test detected the presence of diabetic retinopathy in 250 patients. Ophthalmologist exam confirmed a diagnosis of diabetic retinopathy in 200 patients who tested positive in the screening test, as well as 10 patients who tested negative in the screening test. What is the sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value, and negative predictive value of the screening test?
translated_question: 某糖尿病诊所实施了一项采用远程医疗方法诊断糖尿病视网膜病变的新型筛查测试。所有患者均接受了眼科医生检查作为诊断的金标准。在一项包含500名患者的试点研究中，筛查测试检测出250名患者存在糖尿病视网膜病变。眼科医生检查确认，在筛查测试呈阳性的患者中有200人被诊断为糖尿病视网膜病变，同时在筛查测试呈阴性的患者中也有10人被确诊。请问该筛查测试的灵敏度、特异度、阳性预测值和阴性预测值分别是多少？

translated_options.A: 灵敏度 = 83%，特异度 = 95%，阳性预测值 = 80%，阴性预测值 = 96%

translated_answer: 灵敏度 = 95%，特异度 = 83%，阳性预测值 = 80%，阴性预测值 = 96%

original_question: A healthy 22-year-old male participates in a research study you are leading to compare the properties of skeletal and cardiac muscle. You conduct a 3-phased experiment with the participant. In the first phase, you get him to lift up a 2.3 kg (5 lb) weight off a table with his left hand. In the second phase, you get him to do 20 burpees, taking his heart rate to 150/min. In the third phase, you electrically stimulate his gastrocnemius with a frequency of 50 Hz. translated_question: 一名健康的22岁男性参与了你主导的一项研究，旨在比较骨骼肌与心肌的特性。你对该参与者进行了三阶段实验。第一阶段，你让他用左手从桌上举起一个2.3公斤（5磅）的负重。第二阶段，你让他完成20次波比跳，使其心率达到150次/分钟。第三阶段，你以50赫兹的频率电刺激他的腓肠肌。你关注的是特定肌肉在相应阶段的张力与电活动情况：第一阶段关注肱二头肌，第二阶段关注心肌，第三阶段关注腓肠肌。你预计在各阶段及相应目标肌肉中会发生什么？

original_options.A: Recruitment of small motor units at the start of experiments 1 and 2
original_options.B: Recruitment of large motor units followed by small motor units in experiment 1
original_options.C: Fused tetanic contraction at the end of all three experiments
original_options.D: Increase of tension in all phases

translated_options.A: 实验1和实验2开始时小运动单位的募集
translated_options.B: 实验1中，先募集大运动单位，后募集小运动单位

original_answer: Increase of tension in all phases

original_question: A 20-year-old male comes into your office two days after falling during a pick up basketball game. The patient states that the lateral aspect of his knee collided with another player's knee. On exam, the patient's right knee appears the same size as his left knee without any swelling or effusion. The patient has intact sensation and strength in both lower extremities. The patient's right knee has no laxity upon varus stress test, but is more lax upon valgus stress test when compared to his left knee. Lachman's test and posterior drawer test both have firm endpoints without laxity. Which of the following structures has this patient injured?
translated_question: 一名20岁男性在街头篮球比赛中摔倒两天后来到你的诊室。患者自述其膝盖外侧与另一名球员的膝盖发生碰撞。检查显示，患者右膝与左膝大小一致，无肿胀或积液。患者双下肢感觉和肌力均正常。右膝在内翻应力测试中无松弛，但与外翻应力测试相比，其右膝较左膝更为松弛。Lachman试验和后抽屉试验均显示终点稳固，无松弛。该患者损伤了以下哪个结构？

original_question:
A 4-year-old boy is brought to the physician because of swelling around his eyes for 4 days. The swelling is most severe in the morning and milder by bedtime. Ten days ago, he had a sore throat that resolved spontaneously. His temperature is 37°C (98.6°F), pulse is 103/min, and blood pressure is 88/52 mm Hg. Examination shows 3+ pitting edema of the lower extremities and periorbital edema. The remainder of the examination shows no abnormalities. Laboratory studies show:

Serum complement concentrations are within the reference ranges. Which of the following is the most appropriate next step in management?"

一名4岁男童因眼周水肿4天被带至医生处就诊。水肿在晨起时最严重，至睡前有所减轻。10天前，他曾有咽喉疼痛，后自行缓解。体温37°C（98.6°F），脉搏103次/分，血压88/52 mmHg。检查显示下肢及眼周3+凹陷性水肿。其余检查未见异常。实验室检查显示：

血清补体浓度在参考范围内。下列哪项是下一步最合适的处理措施？

original_question: An 18-year-old man comes to the clinic with his mom for “pins and needles” of both of his arms. He denies any past medical history besides a recent anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) tear that was repaired 1 week ago. The patient reports that the paresthesias are mostly located along the posterior forearms, left more than the right. What physical examination finding would you expect from this patient?
translated_question: 一名18岁男性在母亲陪同下来到诊所，主诉双臂出现“针刺感”。除近期前交叉韧带撕裂并于一周前接受修复手术外，患者否认其他既往病史。患者报告感觉异常主要位于前臂后侧，左侧较右侧更为明显。您预计该患者会出现何种体格检查结果？

original_options.C: Loss of forearm flexion and supination

translated_options.C: 前臂屈曲和旋后功能丧失

original_question: A 9-year-old girl is resuscitated after the administration of an erroneous dose of intravenous phenytoin for recurrent seizures. This incident is reported to the authorities. A thorough investigation reveals various causative factors leading to the event. One important finding is a verbal misunderstanding of the dose of phenytoin between the ordering senior resident and the receiving first-year resident during the handover of the patient. To minimize the risk of this particular error in the future, the most appropriate management is to implement which of the following?
translated_question: 一名9岁女孩因复发性癫痫发作，被错误剂量静脉注射苯妥英后接受复苏。该事件已上报给相关部门。深入调查揭示了导致此事件的各种原因。其中一个重要发现是，在患者交接过程中，高级住院医师下达医嘱时与接收医嘱的第一年住院医师之间对苯妥英剂量存在口头误解。为最大程度降低未来发生此类特定错误的风险，最恰当的管理措施是实施以下哪一项？

original_question:
You are the team physician for an NBA basketball team. On the morning of an important playoff game, an EKG of a star player, Mr. P, shows findings suspicious for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM). Mr. P is an otherwise healthy, fit, professional athlete.

The playoff game that night is the most important of Mr. P's career. When you inform the coach that you are thinking of restricting Mr. P's participation, he threatens to fire you. Later that day you receive a phone call from the owner of the team threatening a lawsuit should you restrict Mr. P's ability to play. Mr. P states that he will be playing in the game "if it's the last thing I do."

Which of the following is the most appropriate next step?
translated_question:
你是某NBA篮球队的队医。在一场重要的季后赛当天早晨，明星球员P先生的心电图显示可疑的肥厚型心肌病（HCM）征象。P先生除此之外身体健康、体格健壮，是一名职业运动员。

当晚的季后赛是P先生职业生涯中最重要的一场比赛。当你告知教练你正考虑限制P先生参赛时，他威胁要解雇你。当天晚些时候，你接到球队老板的电话，威胁说如果你限制P先生上场，他将提起诉讼。P先生则表示，他“哪怕拼上性命”也要参加这场比赛。

以下哪项是最合适的下一步措施？

original_options.A: Consult with a psychiatrist to have Mr. P committed
original_options.B: Call the police and have Mr. P arrested
original_options.C: Allow Mr. P to play against medical advice
original_options.D: Educate Mr. P about the risks of HCM

translated_options.A: 建议咨询精神科医生，为P先生办理强制入院手续。
translated_options.C: 允许P先生违背医嘱进行活动
translated_options.D: 向P先生讲解肥厚型心肌病的相关风险。

original_answer: Educate Mr. P about the risks of HCM
translated_answer: 向P先生讲解肥厚型心肌病的相关风险。

original_question: A 37-year-old woman presents to the emergency department complaining of generalized malaise, weakness, headache, nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea; she last felt well roughly two days ago. She is otherwise healthy, and takes no medications. Her vital signs are: T 38.0, HR 96 beats per minute, BP 110/73, and O2 sat 96% on room air. Pulmonary exam is clear to auscultation bilaterally with good air movement. Abdominal exam reveals a bruit, normoactive bowel sounds, and an audible borborygmus. translated_question: 一名32岁女性因常规健康检查就诊于其初级保健医生。患者目前无任何不适主诉，仅希望确认自身健康状况良好。患者既往有哮喘、高血压和焦虑症病史。当前用药包括沙丁胺醇、氟替卡松、氢氯噻嗪、赖诺普利和非索非那定。体温99.5°F（37.5°C），血压165/95 mmHg，心率70次/分，呼吸15次/分，室内空气下血氧饱和度98%。查体可见一位体型纤瘦的健康年轻女性。心脏听诊可闻及第一、第二心音，心率正常。双肺听诊呼吸音清晰，通气良好。腹部听诊可闻及血管杂音，肠鸣音正常活跃，并伴有明显肠鸣音。神经系统检查显示颅神经II-XII大致完整，上下肢肌力及反射正常。下列哪项是下一步最合适的处理措施？

original_question:
A 46-year-old man comes to the emergency department because of a 10-day history of right upper quadrant abdominal pain. He has also been feeling tired and nauseous for the past 6 weeks. On examination, scleral icterus is present. Abdominal examination shows tenderness to palpation in the right upper quadrant. The liver edge is palpated 2 cm below the right costal margin. Laboratory studies show:
Aspartate aminotransferase 1780 U/L
Alanine aminotransferase 2520 U/L
Hepatitis A IgM antibody Negative

一名46岁男性因右上腹疼痛10天前来急诊就诊。过去6周他还感到疲劳和恶心。体格检查可见巩膜黄染。腹部检查显示右上腹触痛。肝缘在右肋缘下2厘米处可触及。实验室检查显示：
天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶 1780 U/L

丙型肝炎抗体 阳性
丙型肝炎RNA 阴性
以下哪项是该患者的最佳处理方案？

original_question: A 5-year-old boy who recently emigrated from Nigeria is brought to the emergency department because of a 2-day history of lower leg weakness, swallowing difficulty, and drooling of saliva. He has not yet received any childhood vaccinations. Two days after admission, the patient develops shortness of breath. Pulse oximetry shows an oxygen saturation of 64%. Neurological examination of this patient would have most likely shown which of the following findings?
translated_question: 一名5岁男童，近期从尼日利亚移居，因出现下肢无力、吞咽困难及流涎症状两天被送往急诊科。该患儿尚未接种任何儿童疫苗。入院两天后，患者出现呼吸急促。脉搏血氧仪显示血氧饱和度为64%。尽管进行了复苏抢救，患者仍因呼吸衰竭死亡。尸检显示脊髓前角细胞受损。该患者的神经系统检查最可能显示以下哪项结果？

original_question:
A 30-year-old woman is brought to the urgent care clinic by her husband. She complains of numbness around her lips and a tingling sensation in her hands and feet. She underwent near-total thyroidectomy for an enlarged thyroid gland a month ago. Vital signs include: blood pressure is 130/70 mm Hg, pulse is 72/min, respiratory rate is 16/min, and temperature is 37.0°C (98.6°F). A surgical incision scar is present in the anterior aspect of the neck. The attending physician inflates the blood pressure cuff above 150 mm Hg and observes the patient a couple of minutes while measuring her blood pressure. The patient develops sudden stiffness and tingling in her hand. Blood test results are as follows:

一名30岁女性由其丈夫带至急诊诊所就诊。患者主诉口周麻木及手足刺痛感。一个月前因甲状腺肿大接受了近全甲状腺切除术。生命体征包括：血压130/70 mmHg，心率72次/分，呼吸频率16次/分，体温37.0°C（98.6°F）。颈部前侧可见手术切口疤痕。接诊医师将血压袖带充气至150 mmHg以上，在测量血压过程中观察患者数分钟。患者突发手部僵硬和刺痛感。血液检查结果如下：

白细胞计数7000/mm³

白蛋白4 g/dL
血清丙氨酸氨基转移酶（ALT）15 U/L

尿素27 mg/dL
钠137 mEq/L
钾4.5 mEq/L
镁2.5 mEq/L
尿液分析未见白细胞或红细胞，白细胞酯酶阴性。对该患者的下一步最佳处理措施是什么？

original_options.A: CT scan abdomen with pancreatic protocol

original_question: A woman with coronary artery disease is starting to go for a walk. As she begins, her heart rate accelerates from a resting pulse of 60 bpm until it reaches a rate of 120 bpm, at which point she begins to feel a tightening in her chest. She stops walking to rest and the tightening resolves. This has been happening to her consistently for the last 6 months. Which of the following is a true statement?
translated_question: 一名患有冠状动脉疾病的女性开始散步。当她起步时，心率从静息时的60次/分钟逐渐加快，直至达到120次/分钟，此时她开始感到胸部发紧。她停下脚步休息后，这种紧绷感便消失了。这种情况在过去6个月里一直持续发生。以下哪项陈述是正确的？

original_options.A: Increasing the heart rate increases the amount of time spent during each cardiac cycle
original_options.B: Increasing the heart rate decreases the relative amount of time spent during diastole
original_options.C: Perfusion of the myocardium takes place primarily during systole
original_options.D: Perfusion of the myocardium takes place equally throughout the cardiac cycle

translated_options.A: 增加心率会延长每个心动周期所持续的时间。
translated_options.B: 增加心率会减少舒张期所占的相对时间
translated_options.C: 心肌灌注主要发生在收缩期
translated_options.D: 心肌灌注在整个心动周期中均匀进行。

original_answer: Increasing the heart rate decreases the relative amount of time spent during diastole
translated_answer: 增加心率会减少舒张期所占的相对时间

original_question: A 22-year-old female presents to her physician for evaluation of a vaginal discharge, itching, and irritation. She recently started a new relationship with her boyfriend, who is her only sexual partner. He does not report any genitourinary symptoms. She takes oral contraceptives and does not use  barrier contraception. The medical history is unremarkable. The vital signs are within normal limits. Which of the following organisms will most likely be revealed on wet mount microscopy?
translated_question: 一名22岁女性因阴道分泌物异常、瘙痒及刺激感就诊于医生。她近期开始与男友交往，对方是其唯一性伴侣。男友未报告任何泌尿生殖系统症状。患者口服避孕药，未使用屏障避孕措施。既往病史无特殊。生命体征在正常范围内。妇科检查显示阴道分泌物稀薄、黄色、泡沫状，伴有霉味及难闻气味，宫颈外可见多处点状红色斑疹。其余检查结果正常。湿片显微镜检查最可能发现以下哪种微生物？

original_options.B: Epithelial cells covered by numerous bacterial cells

translated_options.A: 出芽酵母细胞和/或假菌丝

translated_options.C: 能动圆形或椭圆形微生物

translated_answer: 活动性圆形或椭圆形微生物

original_question:
A 53-year-old woman with hypertension and hyperlipidemia comes to the physician because of generalized reddening of her skin and itching for the past 2 weeks. Her symptoms occur every evening before bedtime and last for about 30 minutes. Three months ago, atorvastatin was stopped after she experienced progressively worsening neck and back pain. Statin therapy was reinitiated at lower doses 3 weeks ago but had to be stopped again after her musculoskeletal symptoms recurred. Her menses occur irregularly at 2–3 month intervals and last for 3–4 days. She has smoked one pack of cigarettes daily for the past 30 years. Her current medications include lisinopril and niacin. Her brother died of colonic adenocarcinoma, and her father died of small cell lung cancer. She is 169 cm (5 ft 6 in) tall and weighs 83 kg (183 lb); BMI is 29 kg/m2. Her vital signs are within normal limits. Physical examination shows no abnormalities. Serum lipid studies show:
Total cholesterol 247 mg/dL
HDL-cholesterol 39 mg/dL
LDL-cholesterol 172 mg/dL
Triglycerides 152 mg/dL
Which of the following is the most appropriate next step in management?"
translated_question:
一名53岁女性，因高血压和高脂血症就诊，主诉近2周出现全身皮肤发红伴瘙痒。症状每晚睡前发作，持续约30分钟。3个月前，患者因颈部和背部疼痛逐渐加重而停用阿托伐他汀。3周前以小剂量重新开始他汀类药物治疗，但因肌肉骨骼症状复发而再次停药。患者月经不规律，每2-3个月来潮一次，持续3-4天。吸烟史30年，每日1包。当前用药包括赖诺普利和烟酸。其兄弟死于结肠腺癌，父亲死于小细胞肺癌。身高169厘米（5英尺6英寸），体重83公斤（183磅），体重指数为29 kg/m²。生命体征正常。体格检查未见异常。血脂检查结果如下：
总胆固醇 247 mg/dL
高密度脂蛋白胆固醇 39 mg/dL
低密度脂蛋白胆固醇 172 mg/dL
甘油三酯 152 mg/dL
以下哪项是下一步最合适的处理措施？

translated_options.B: 检测尿中羟基吲哚乙酸水平
translated_options.C: 检测尿液中甲氧基肾上腺素水平
translated_options.D: 将烟酸更换为非诺贝特

original_question: Five days after undergoing right knee arthroplasty for osteoarthritis, a 68-year-old man has severe pain in this right knee preventing him from participating in physical therapy. On the third postoperative day when the dressing was changed, the surgical wound appeared to be intact, slightly swollen, and had a clear secretion. He has a history of diabetes, hyperlipidemia, and hypertension. Current medications include metformin, enalapril, and simvastatin. His temperature is 37.3°C (99.1°F), pulse is 94/min, and blood pressure is 130/88 mm Hg. His right knee is swollen, erythematous, and tender to palpation. There is pain on movement of the joint. The medial parapatellar skin incision appears superficially opened in its proximal and distal part with yellow-green discharge. There is blackening of the skin on both sides of the incision. Which of the following is the next best step in the management of this patient?
translated_question: 一名68岁男性因骨关节炎接受右膝关节置换术后五天，出现右膝剧烈疼痛，导致其无法参与物理治疗。术后第三天更换敷料时，手术伤口外观完整、轻度肿胀并有清亮分泌物。患者有糖尿病、高脂血症和高血压病史。当前用药包括二甲双胍、依那普利和辛伐他汀。体温37.3°C（99.1°F），脉搏94次/分，血压130/88 mmHg。右膝肿胀、发红、触痛明显，关节活动时疼痛。内侧髌旁皮肤切口近端和远端部分表面开放，有黄绿色分泌物，切口两侧皮肤发黑。对该患者下一步的最佳处理措施是什么？

original_question: A 53-year-old woman comes to the physician in February because of a 1-day history of fever, chills, headache, and dry cough. She also reports malaise and generalized muscle aches. She works as a teacher at a local high school, where there was recently an outbreak of influenza. She has a history of intermittent asthma, for which she takes albuterol as needed. She declined the influenza vaccine offered in the fall because her sister told her that a friend developed a flulike illness after receiving the vaccine. She is worried about possibly becoming ill and cannot afford to miss work. Her temperature is 37.9°C (100.3°F), heart rate is 58/min, and her respirations are 12/min. Physical examination is unremarkable. Her hemoglobin concentration is 14.5 g/dL, leukocyte count is 9,400/mm3, and platelet count is 280,000/mm3. In addition to analgesia, which of the following is the most appropriate next step in management?
translated_question: 一名53岁女性因发热、寒战、头痛及干咳1天于2月就诊。患者同时主诉全身乏力及肌肉酸痛。她在当地一所高中任教，该校近期暴发流感。患者有间歇性哮喘病史，按需使用沙丁胺醇治疗。去年秋季她拒绝了流感疫苗接种，因其姐姐告知有朋友接种后出现流感样症状。患者担心可能患病且无法承受误工损失。体温37.9°C（100.3°F），心率58次/分，呼吸频率12次/分。体格检查未见异常。血红蛋白浓度14.5 g/dL，白细胞计数9400/mm³，血小板计数28万/mm³。除镇痛治疗外，下列哪项是下一步最合适的处理措施？

original_question: Red-green color blindness, an X-linked recessive disorder, has an incidence of 1/200 in males in a certain population. What is the probability of a phenotypically normal male and female having a child with red-green color blindness?
translated_question: 红绿色盲是一种X连锁隐性遗传病，在某特定人群中的男性发病率为1/200。问一名表型正常的男性和一名表型正常的女性生育红绿色盲孩子的概率是多少？

original_question: A 45-year-old man is transferred to the intensive care unit from the emergency department for acute respiratory failure. He was rushed to the hospital after developing progressive respiratory distress over the last 24 hours. His medical history is significant for long-standing severe persistent asthma, hypertension, and several bouts of community and hospital-acquired pneumonia. His medications include amlodipine, lisinopril, inhaled fluticasone, salmeterol, and oral prednisone. He is a lifelong non-smoker and drinks alcohol occasionally on the weekends. He works as a sales executive and went to Hawaii a month ago. In the emergency department, he was started on broad-spectrum antibiotics and bronchodilators. His respiratory failure progressively worsens, and on day 2 of admission, he requires mechanical ventilator support. Chest X-ray shows multiple nodules bilaterally in the lower lobes. Flexible bronchoscopy is performed and the bronchoalveolar lavage sample from the medial segment of the right lower lobe shows neutrophils, and the fungal preparation shows Aspergillus fumigatus. A video-assisted thoracoscopy is performed and biopsy from the right lower lobe is taken which shows plugging of the terminal bronchioles with mucus, inflammatory cells, and fungal vascular invasion. Which of the following is the most likely mechanism responsible for the biopsy findings?
translated_question: 一名45岁男性因急性呼吸衰竭从急诊科转入重症监护室。他在过去24小时内出现进行性呼吸困难后被紧急送往医院。其病史包括长期严重持续性哮喘、高血压以及多次社区获得性和医院获得性肺炎。目前用药包括氨氯地平、赖诺普利、吸入用氟替卡松、沙美特罗和口服泼尼松。他终身不吸烟，仅在周末偶尔饮酒。职业为销售主管，一个月前曾前往夏威夷。在急诊科，他已开始接受广谱抗生素和支气管扩张剂治疗。其呼吸衰竭持续恶化，入院第2天需接受机械通气支持。胸部X光片显示双侧下叶多发结节。行可弯曲支气管镜检查，右肺下叶内侧段支气管肺泡灌洗样本显示中性粒细胞，真菌涂片显示烟曲霉。随后进行电视辅助胸腔镜手术，右肺下叶活检显示终末细支气管被黏液、炎性细胞及真菌血管侵犯堵塞。以下哪项是导致该活检结果最可能的机制？

original_options.B: Aspergillus fumigatus suppresses the production of IgA
original_options.C: Aspergillus fumigatus suppresses the production of IgM
original_options.D: Suppression of the innate immune system by Aspergillus fumigatus

translated_options.B: 烟曲霉菌抑制免疫球蛋白A的产生。
translated_options.D: 烟曲霉菌对先天免疫系统的抑制

original_question: A 70-year-old man comes to the physician because of a 4-month history of epigastric pain, nausea, and weakness. He has smoked one pack of cigarettes daily for 50 years and drinks one alcoholic beverage daily. He appears emaciated. He is 175 cm (5 ft 9 in) tall and weighs 47 kg (103 lb); BMI is 15 kg/m2. He is diagnosed with gastric cancer. Which of the following cytokines is the most likely direct cause of this patient’s examination findings?
translated_question: 一名70岁男性因上腹部疼痛、恶心及乏力4个月就诊。患者有50年吸烟史，每日一包，每日饮用一份酒精饮料。患者呈恶病质状态。身高175厘米（5英尺9英寸），体重47公斤（103磅），体重指数为15 kg/m²。诊断为胃癌。以下哪种细胞因子最可能是导致该患者检查结果的直接原因？

original_question:
A 40-year-old woman comes to the physician because of a 1-week history of fatigue, dark urine, and a feeling of heaviness in her legs. Two weeks ago, she returned from a vacation to Brazil, where she spent most of her days exploring the city of Rio de Janeiro on foot. She also gained 3 kg (7 lb) during her vacation. She has systemic lupus erythematosus. Her only medication is hydroxychloroquine. Her temperature is 37.5°C (99.5°F), pulse is 78/min, and blood pressure is 162/98 mm Hg. Physical examination shows 2+ pretibial edema bilaterally. Urinalysis shows:
Blood 3+
Protein 1+
RBC 6–8/hpf with dysmorphic features
RBC casts numerous
WBC 8/hpf
WBC casts rare
Bacteria negative
Which of the following is the most likely cause of this patient's leg findings?"
translated_question:
一名40岁女性因持续1周的疲劳、尿色加深及双腿沉重感就诊。两周前，她刚从巴西度假归来，期间大部分时间在里约热内卢徒步游览。度假期间体重增加了3公斤（7磅）。患者有系统性红斑狼疮病史，目前仅服用羟氯喹。体温37.5°C（99.5°F），脉搏78次/分，血压162/98毫米汞柱。体格检查显示双侧胫前2+水肿。尿液分析结果如下：
隐血3+
蛋白1+
红细胞6-8/高倍视野（形态异常）
红细胞管型大量
白细胞8/高倍视野
白细胞管型偶见
细菌阴性
以下哪项是导致该患者腿部表现最可能的原因？

original_question: A 67-year-old woman with advanced bladder cancer comes to the physician for a follow-up examination. She is currently undergoing chemotherapy with an agent that forms cross-links between DNA strands. Serum studies show a creatinine concentration of 2.1 mg/dL and a blood urea nitrogen concentration of 30 mg/dL. Urine dipstick of a clean-catch midstream specimen shows 2+ protein and 1+ glucose. Prior to initiation of chemotherapy, her laboratory values were within the reference range. In addition to hydration, administration of which of the following would most likely have prevented this patient's current condition?
translated_question: 一名67岁女性晚期膀胱癌患者前来进行随访检查。她目前正在接受一种能在DNA链间形成交联的化疗药物治疗。血清检查显示肌酐浓度为2.1 mg/dL，血尿素氮浓度为30 mg/dL。清洁中段尿试纸检测显示尿蛋白2+、尿糖1+。在开始化疗前，她的实验室指标均在参考范围内。除了水化治疗外，使用下列哪种药物最有可能预防该患者当前状况的发生？

original_question: A 57-year-old post-menopausal woman comes to the physician because of intermittent, bloody post-coital vaginal discharge for the past month. She does not have pain with intercourse. Eleven years ago, she had LSIL on a routine Pap smear and testing for high-risk HPV strains was positive. Colposcopy showed CIN 1. She has not returned for follow-up Pap smears since then. She is sexually active with her husband only, and they do not use condoms. She has smoked half a pack of cigarettes per day for the past 25 years and does not drink alcohol. original_question: Three days after starting a new drug for malaria prophylaxis, a 19-year-old college student comes to the physician because of dark-colored urine and fatigue.
